content.en:
Ye Tian's current combat power had reached the fifth stage of the invincible level, and he didn't have much to think about, and directly and quickly searched for resources inside the Eternal True Ruins.

Of course, he also encountered many attacks.

However, his strength is strong and he is willing to work hard, and it is not easy to fall.

Anyway, he's not cowering as much as he used to be.

And the speed at which he found resources was not comparable to the past, and he found a lot of resources in a short period of time.

Of course.

Every once in a while, he had to change to a replica body, after all, even if it hadn't fallen, that replica body would have been so badly damaged that it couldn't exert much strength.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a golden thorn tree, and it was a boundary-breaking golden thorn tree.

After this golden thorn tree saw Ye Tian, he directly started it.

"Immeasurable Feather Armor!"

The power of the Immeasurable Divine Power turned into Immeasurable Feather Armor, enveloping his whole body.

Immediately, he unleashed his ten-armed golden body and entered the ten-armed golden body battle state.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian showed the invincible fifth-stage combat power.

However, in the face of this boundary-breaking golden thorn tree, the opponent only had a spike that directly pierced his body, severely hurting him.

After a while, Ye Tian's replica body was bombarded and killed.

......

"The Boundary-Breaking Golden Thorn Tree is too terrifying! I can't compete with him unless I have cultivated the Heaven Slaying Blade!" Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he avoided the area and would not provoke the other party.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian had gathered several more Heaven Slaying Blade materials, and he still needed three more pieces to gather the Heaven Slaying Blade cultivation materials.

He wanted to continue looking for resources in the Eternal Ruins, but on this day, the Eternal Ruins were shaken.

"The Eternal Ruins are gone!"

A great ancestor outside the Eternal True Ruins said.

It is impossible for the Eternal Ruins to stay in one place forever, especially after a large number of outsiders enter the Eternal Ruins, and it will not be long before it will move places.

It's a law that no one can explain.

Whew!!!

A Great Ancestor who was still inside the Eternal True Ruins was forcibly removed.

Ye Tian's several replica bodies couldn't resist, and they were about to be transferred.

At the critical moment, he directly annihilated the other replica bodies, leaving only one replica body.

As a result, only one copy of his body was removed.

......

Somewhere in the Eternal Ruins.

Ye Tian's replica body of an Eternal True Ruins creature is hiding here, and he wants to use this replica body to lock the next location of the Eternal True Ruins.

However, he soon found himself overthinking.

Airplanes!!!

An unimaginable force swept across the entire Eternal True Ruins.

Many of the marks left by the Great Ancestor and even the Heavenly Ancestor were erased one by one, and this power also locked on Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!

His duplicate body was directly annihilated.

"It was discovered, and the native creatures of the Eternal True Ruins that I copied were exactly the same as the original, but they were still discovered!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

Swish!

The Eternal Ruins disappeared in an instant, and no one could find them in a short time.

......

Genki Territory.

Ye Tian came back with the second batch of resources he found.

"It's a pity that I can't find the Eternal True Ruins, otherwise I can definitely find more resources in some years!" Ye Tian said regretfully.

Of course.

Compared to other fifth-stage Great Ancestors, his harvest was definitely unimaginable.

"Next, you only need to find the three materials of Red Dragon True Water, Void Shadow Liquid, and Immortal Boundary Stone to cultivate the Heaven Slaying Blade's immeasurable divine power. Now there is no shortcut to improve your strength, so slowly cultivate all kinds of immeasurable supernatural powers, and rely on a large number of immeasurable supernatural powers to superimpose your strength!"

Not only him, but many Great Ancestors also did the same.

And he joined the Universal Alliance, so he had the channel to buy many top-notch immeasurable magical powers.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to cultivate a variety of top-notch immeasurable supernatural powers, increasing his strength by superimposing immeasurable supernatural powers.

In this way, Ye Tian's strength gradually increased, and he practiced more and more immeasurable magical powers.

this day.

Ye Tian was about to go to the fourth floor of the Huanyu Tower.

The fourth layer corresponds to the fifth stage of the invincible level, and his current strength is definitely not weak in the fifth stage of the invincible level, and it can even be said to be very strong.

Therefore, he should have a chance to break through the fourth floor of the Cosmos Tower.

Of course.

He has now reached the fifth stage of cultivation, so even if he passes through the fourth layer, the reward he gets is not necessarily more precious than the third layer, but at least it is a reward!

......

The fourth floor of the Universal Tower.

Ye Tian entered here.

Airplanes!!!!

The void was transformed, and an invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestor appeared on the other side.

"It's you!"

Ye Tian recognized it, this Great Ancestor was one of the three Invincible Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestors who had besieged him before, the True Xuan Great Ancestor!

The True Xuan Great Ancestor also recognized Ye Tian and immediately knew his situation.

"Universal Tower!!!

He frowned.

He didn't expect that he was blocked by the Huanyu Tower and became the target of sparring partners.

He chatted with the Huanyu Tower, and the other Great Ancestors only knew that the Huanyu Tower would silently pull the Great Ancestor in as a target for breaking through, and he would die if he was not careful.

However, he is an invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor, so the Cosmos Tower will not forcibly let this Great Ancestor fall, even if it fails, he can keep one, but the price of heavy damage must be there.

Of course, he didn't want to be hit hard, so he had to hit Ye Tian hard.

Ye Tian had a conflict with the True Xuan Great Ancestor, so as soon as the two sides met, they took action directly.

"Ten Arms Golden Body!"

Ye Tian erupted with the power of this immeasurable supernatural technique, and the ten arms cast another immeasurable supernatural technique, and under the eruption in unison, a single blow broke many defenses of the True Xuan Great Ancestor, directly shocking it away.

"Ten-armed Golden !!"

The True Xuan Great Ancestor recognized it and was immediately shocked.

He didn't expect Ye Tian to actually practice this kind of immeasurable supernatural power technique that ranked on the immeasurable supernatural power list.

Thundered!!!

The two kept colliding, and the battle was extremely fierce.

The void is annihilated, and time and space are shattered.

But the Cosmos Tower sealed off this place, and no matter how much they fought, they couldn't completely annihilate this area.

After a while, the True Xuan Great Ancestor was injured, and he couldn't bear it anymore.

However, the Huanyu Tower has not yet recognized Ye Tian as passing.

As a result, Ye Tian tried his best to attack the True Xuan Great Ancestor, and blasted the True Xuan Great Ancestor's flesh and blood again and again.

Finally, when the True Xuan Great Ancestor was extremely seriously injured, the Cosmos Tower announced that he had broken through the fourth layer.
